name: L-tyrosine
mechanism: Substrate for tyrosine hydroxylase, the rate-limiting enzyme in catecholamine synthesis; also contributes to thyroid-hormone and melanin precursor biology.
contraindications: Levodopa (possible transport competition with large neutral amino acids at gut/BBB)
thyroid hormone co-use is a theoretical caution rather than a well-established DDI.
summary: Substrate for tyrosine hydroxylase, the rate-limiting enzyme in catecholamine synthesis; also contributes to thyroid-hormone and melanin precursor biology.
